      player1_handle: '',

    // On load, notify Captivate of available fields
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

  // Captivate will call this to get the latest data
  getData() {
    return this.data;
  }

  setData(newData) {
    this.data = {
      ...this.data,
      ...newData
    };
    // Notify Captivate of the update
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

sourcesContent:
// src/captivateDataController.js

class GameDataController {
  constructor() {
    // Only use the new, robust variable set for Captivate
    this.data = {
      player1_name: '',
      player1_handle: '',
      player1_avatarUrl: '',
      player1_aura: 0,
      player1_skill: 0,
      player1_stamina: 0,
      player2_name: '',
      player2_handle: '',
      player2_avatarUrl: '',
      player2_aura: 0,
      player2_skill: 0,
      player2_stamina: 0,
      card1_character: '',
      card1_imageUrl: '',
      card1_rarity: '',
      card1_rarityImageUrl: '',
      card1_color: '',
      card1_score: 0,
      card1_aura: 0,
      card1_skill: 0,
      card1_stamina: 0,
      card1_socialImageUrl: '',
      card1_tier: '',
      card1_quote: '',
      card1_vfc: '',
      card1_cardId: '',
      card2_character: '',
      card2_imageUrl: '',
      card2_rarity: '',
      card2_rarityImageUrl: '',
      card2_color: '',
      card2_score: 0,
      card2_aura: 0,
      card2_skill: 0,
      card2_stamina: 0,
      card2_socialImageUrl: '',
      card2_tier: '',
      card2_quote: '',
      card2_vfc: '',
      card2_cardId: '',
      winner_character: '',
      winner_imageUrl: '',
      winner_rarity: '',
      winner_rarityImageUrl: '',
      winner_color: '',
      winner_score: 0,
      winner_aura: 0,
      winner_skill: 0,
      winner_stamina: 0,
      winner_socialImageUrl: '',
      winner_tier: '',
      winner_quote: '',
      winner_vfc: '',
      winner_cardId: '',
    };

    // On load, notify Captivate of available fields
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

  // Captivate will call this to get the latest data
  getData() {
    return this.data;
  }

  // Your app should call this to update the data
  setData(newData) {
    this.data = { ...this.data, ...newData };
    // Notify Captivate of the update
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

  // Utility: Map game state to Captivate variable structure and update data
  updateFromGameState(gameState) {
    const mapped = {
      player1_name: gameState.player1?.name || gameState.player1?.email || '',
      player1_handle: gameState.player1?.handle || gameState.player1?.email || '',
      player1_avatarUrl: gameState.player1?.avatarUrl || '',
      player1_aura: gameState.player1?.aura ?? gameState.player1?.score?.aura ?? 0,
      player1_skill: gameState.player1?.skill ?? gameState.player1?.score?.skill ?? 0,
      player1_stamina: gameState.player1?.stamina ?? gameState.player1?.score?.stamina ?? 0,
      player2_name: gameState.player2?.name || gameState.player2?.email || '',

      card1_color: gameState.card1?.color || '',
      card1_score: gameState.card1?.score ?? gameState.card1?.['base score'] ?? 0,
      card1_aura: gameState.card1?.aura ?? gameState.card1?.Aura ?? 0,

      card1_cardId: gameState.card1?.cardId || gameState.card1?.card || '',
      card2_character: gameState.card2?.character || '',
      card2_imageUrl: gameState.card2?.imageUrl || gameState.card2?.image || '',
      card2_rarity: gameState.card2?.rarity || '',
      card2_rarityImageUrl: gameState.card2?.rarityImageUrl || gameState.card2?.['rarity image'] || '',
      card2_color: gameState.card2?.color || '',
      card2_score: gameState.card2?.score ?? gameState.card2?.['base score'] ?? 0,

      winner_aura: gameState.winner?.aura ?? gameState.winner?.Aura ?? 0,
      winner_skill: gameState.winner?.skill ?? gameState.winner?.Skill ?? 0,

      winner_vfc: gameState.winner?.vfc || '',
      winner_cardId: gameState.winner?.cardId || gameState.winner?.card || '',
    };
    this.setData(mapped);
  }
}

// Attach to window so Captivate can find it
window.gameDataController = new GameDataController();

// Optionally, export for use in your app
export default window.gameDataController;
